main.tagline: A local-first voice journal for organizing your thoughts
main.empty_cta: Start by recording. Press the mic button or {key} to begin speaking.

onboarding.title: Welcome to QuickScribe
onboarding.local_note: Everything you record is saved on this device. Choose local transcription (whisper) and local refine (Ollama) and neither audio nor text ever leaves it.
onboarding.step1_desc: Record with a button or a physical hotkey. Put what's on your mind straight into words.
onboarding.step2_desc: The AI organizes your thoughts while keeping the nuance. Move between verbatim, summary and brainstorm.
onboarding.step3_desc: It builds up in your journal; cross-discovery surfaces insights from your past self.
onboarding.sample_text: Um, there is something I have been turning over in my head lately. I cannot quite put it into words yet, but I want to talk it out loud and organize my thinking as I go.

header.journal_title: Journal (browse, search and cross-discover past entries)

privacy.on_device_desc: Transcription and refine both run on this device. No audio or text is ever sent out.
privacy.cloud_desc: Your current transcription/refine uses the cloud, so audio or text is sent to an API.
privacy.offline_mode_desc: While on, refinement and transcription stay local and cloud providers cannot be selected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.label_refine_style: Refine style (also applied to auto-refine after recording)
settings.translate_output: Translate the refined output into a chosen language
settings.tip_translate: When on, the refined output is produced in the chosen language regardless of the language you spoke (the original-language transcript is kept). Useful when standardizing on one language for a work period.
settings.auto_pipeline: After stopping, run transcription through refine automatically
settings.taskbar_widget: Show recording widget in the taskbar
settings.mode_toggle: Toggle (press once to start, again to stop)
settings.label_workspace_id: workspace_id (required for Claude Platform on AWS)
settings.label_bedrock_model: Bedrock model ID (region/account dependent, empty for default)
settings.label_aws_session: Session token (only for temporary credentials, optional)
settings.secret_local_note: Secrets such as API keys are stored in this device's secure storage.
settings.api_key_refine: {provider} API key (used for refine, stored on device only)
settings.tip_timestamps: Keeps the time of what you said so the AI can organize with the flow in mind.
settings.tip_auto_pipeline: When you stop recording, transcription runs straight through AI refine (a refine provider key is required).
settings.tip_audio_format: Opus is compact and journal-friendly. WAV is uncompressed and reliable but large.
settings.ollama_note_1: Local (Ollama) needs no key and runs entirely on-device (your raw thoughts never leave). First start
settings.custom_name_ph: Pattern name (e.g. minutes, daily report, emotion labeling)
settings.custom_instruction_ph:
Instructions for the AI as bullet points. e.g.:
- Separate decisions and to-dos into bullets
- Add a candidate owner and due date to each to-do
settings.tip_custom: Patterns you create appear in the refine-style list (the selector above and the chips on the result screen). The core rules of no fabrication and body-only output are enforced automatically.
settings.tip_hotkey: Click "{key}", then press the key you want to assign.
settings.tip_momentary_2: a physical button (mouse, foot switch, etc.) or hotkey. Release to stop (good for speaking up in meetings or a quick remark).
settings.tip_record_source: Choose the recording source. “System audio: …” records what is playing on that output (the other party’s voice, playback). “Mic + system audio” records your voice and the other party’s at once (for meetings/calls). Takes effect from the next recording.
settings.tip_stt_warn_2: . Each provider states it does not use API audio for training by default, but if privacy matters use “Local”. Keys are stored in this device’s secure storage.
settings.tip_whisper_1: Local whisper runs entirely on-device (audio is never sent out). For mostly-Japanese,
settings.tip_whisper_2: is highly accurate. The selected model is downloaded automatically on first recording (large models take time).
settings.tip_model_download: Models are downloaded on first use and stored on your device (not bundled with the app). The size shown is the approximate download size.
settings.tip_output_1: Save format for the raw transcript. Markdown prepends the creation time, kind, and tags.
settings.tip_output_strong: Refined results are structured Markdown, so they are always saved as .md
settings.tip_taskbar: Record/stop and show-window buttons on the taskbar (Windows). Turn off to hide them.
settings.tip_autostart: Starts QuickScribe automatically when you log in to the OS and keeps it in the tray (no window appears).
settings.shortcut_modifier_required: Combine with a modifier key (Ctrl/Alt/Shift) and press.
settings.about_oss: This app uses open source including whisper.cpp (MIT), libopus (BSD-3-Clause), Tauri (MIT/Apache-2.0) and Svelte (MIT). Third-party attributions are included in THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES with the distribution and in the repository.
settings.tip_show_onboarding: Shows the first-run guide (3 steps) again.

vault.streak_title: Days you have kept journaling. Missing a single day will not break it.
vault.search_placeholder: 🔎 Search body, tags or file name
vault.discovering: AI is reading across your entries…
vault.discover_tip: From the filtered past entries, AI extracts recurring themes, emotional trends, unresolved questions and next steps (requires a refine provider key, up to 30 entries).
vault.discovery_result_tip: Cross-discovery from {n} filtered entries{detail}. Not saved (copy it if you need it).
vault.empty: No entries yet. Recording and refining will save to your journal.

results.refining_status: The AI is organizing your thoughts…
results.term_check_title: The AI detects terms suspected of misrecognition and proposes replacements (eases manual fixes before refining).
results.open_output_title: Open the save folder in your file manager.
results.tags_placeholder: Tags (optional, comma-separated, e.g. work, anxiety, idea)

corrections.none_found: No terms suspected of misrecognition were found.
corrections.head: Suspected misrecognitions ({n}) — check the ones to replace; suggestions are editable

update.downloading: Downloading new version {version} in the background… {pct}%
update.latest: You are on the latest version.

errors.discover_need_two: Cross-discovery needs at least 2 entries (narrow down with tags/search first).
errors.custom_need_both: A custom pattern needs both a name and instructions.
errors.open_output_failed: Could not open the output folder: {detail}
errors.no_audio: No transcribable audio was found (audio was not saved).
errors.empty_text: There is no text to refine (the file is empty or whitespace only).
errors.cfg_workspace_id: Claude Platform on AWS requires a workspace_id.
errors.cfg_aws_keys: Please set your AWS access key / secret.
errors.cfg_api_key_aws: An API key for {provider} is required.
errors.cfg_api_key: Refining requires an API key for {provider}.
